name: Congresswoman Kat Cammack
tweet: I will continue to fight for lawful gun owners' rights to purchase, carry, and possess firearms. It is a fundamental right that cannot be stripped away. Period.

tweet: H.R. 1446 likewise seeks to limit a lawful gun owner's ability to transfer firearms to friends or neighbors. It also does NOTHING to limit gun violence or the illegal gun trade. House Dems' attempts to strip Americans of #2A rights are in full view.

name: Congresswoman Kat Cammack
tweet: Every American should worry that this could lead to a national gun registry. Obama officials in 2013 even said of background checks, "effectiveness depends on...requiring gun registration." It's an infringement upon our basic rights.

name: Congresswoman Kat Cammack
tweet: H.R. 8 would criminalize the private transfer of firearms. This is a direct attack on law-abiding gun owners, serving no purpose because it won't decrease gun violence or prohibit criminal use or transfer of firearms. Gun dealers are already subject to strict laws.

name: Congresswoman Kat Cammack
tweet: No matter the presidential administration, Congress must embrace and retain their role and duty as a body tasked with oversight. As Republicans, we are committed to holding @POTUS accountable for decisions that affect American taxpayers. #MakeItREINS /4

name: Congresswoman Kat Cammack
tweet: In this bill, a major rule is defined as a federal rule or regulation that will have an annual economic effect of $100M or more. It would also give Congress oversight of federal rules that affect American companies' ability to compete with foreign entities. #MakeItREINS 3/

name: Congresswoman Kat Cammack
tweet: The REINS Act would require every new major rule passed by the executive bureaucracy to be approved by both houses of Congress. For too long, the executive branch has ignored Congress' right to executive oversight. #MakeItREINS 2/

name: Congresswoman Kat Cammack
tweet: Today, I am proud to introduce the 2021 REINS Act—Regulations from the Executive In Need of Scrutiny. This is an important step in reasserting Congress' role in the legislative and regulatory process. I'm also pleased to include over half of @HouseGOP as original cosponsors! 1/  https://t.co/t7KpyjxVhs

name: Congresswoman Kat Cammack
tweet: A special thanks to our team and our senior LA Will for all of his hard work in organizing these important conversations for our district.

name: Congresswoman Kat Cammack
tweet: Talking with elected officials in Union and Bradford Counties this morning for the last of our five broadband roundtables. We're discussing RDOF maps, accessibility of broadband, and how we're working to improve internet service across #FL03.  https://t.co/82ner6sO4a

name: Congresswoman Kat Cammack
tweet: The #PelosiPayoff & #BidenBailout isn't #COVID relief. It's a distraction.  https://t.co/Rf09dA425T

name: Congresswoman Kat Cammack
tweet: This bill would disproportionately hurt small businesses and their workers like those in my district. While these companies and workers suffer, labor unions would rake in 39 million dollars over the next 10 years. That is wrong. I will vote nay on H.R. 842. /3

name: Congresswoman Kat Cammack
tweet: I am proud to be from a right-to-work state like Florida where @GovRonDeSantis and local businesses have created both a pro-business and pro-worker environment. American workers should be free to choose where they work and in which organizations they associate. #RightToWork 2/

name: Congresswoman Kat Cammack
tweet: Tonight, we will be voting on H.R. 842 which the Dems call the "PRO Act." In reality, this bill is anti-worker and anti-small business. It would coerce workers into forking over their hard-earned money to Democrat union bosses so they can support their cronies in Congress. 1/

name: Congresswoman Kat Cammack

name: Congresswoman Kat Cammack
tweet: I'm proud to support the brave men and women of the @CBP. We must fully fund and invest in these agents on the front lines of our nation's fight for border security. It's time to #SecureTheBorder. Enough with the #BidenBorderCrisis.   CC: @HomelandGOP

name: Congresswoman Kat Cammack
tweet: We can and must do a better job of securing our border and enforcing our immigration and labor laws. The Democrats refused to fully fund border wall improvements and we're now faced with a dramatic increase in illegal crossings. #BidenBorderCrisis 3/

name: Congresswoman Kat Cammack
tweet: On top of this escalating issue, overall illegal crossings have risen in recent months after a drop over the last four years. There are more than 6,000 illegal entries/day under the Biden administration. It's a crisis of their own creation. 2/

name: Congresswoman Kat Cammack
tweet: The crisis at the border, exacerbated by @POTUS' policies, has turned into a humanitarian and health disaster. Over 3,200 unaccompanied minors are being housed in the #BidenBarracks. This was preventable and a result of feckless, misguided policies. 1/
